exception_title: Temporary WAF bypass for load testing endpoint
compensating_controls: Endpoint restricted to load testing IP range (192.168.50.0/24); CloudFront distribution disabled during test; full WAF re-enabled within 24 hours of test completion
review_outcome: Expired — WAF re-enabled March 28 after load test

exception_title: Direct internet access for ML training node egress
compensating_controls: Limited to specific EC2 instance (i-0abc123def); egress restricted to PyPI and Docker Hub via security group; instance in isolated subnet with no access to payment data; session logging enabled
review_outcome: Expired — ML training migrated to SageMaker with managed egress

exception_title: Cross-VPC peering between staging and production for database schema migration
compensating_controls: Peering active only during migration windows (Saturday 02:00-06:00 UTC); all access logged via VPC Flow Logs; migration scripts use read-only database credentials on production; staging contains only synthetic data; peering connection to be deleted after migration complete
review_outcome: Expired — migration completed October 10. Peering connection scheduled for deletion.

exception_title: TLS 1.2 on legacy payment reconciliation batch endpoint
compensating_controls: Endpoint is internal-only (10.10.4.0/24); processes nightly batch reconciliation files; accessed by single internal service; TLS 1.3 upgrade blocked by vendor library (reconciliation-sdk v2.x); vendor patch expected Q1 2026
review_outcome: Renewed — vendor confirmed TLS 1.3 support in reconciliation-sdk v3.0 release planned February 2026
